nasb.text: The letter was sent by the hand of Elasah the son of Shaphan, and Gemariah the son of Hilkiah, whom Zedekiah king of Judah sent to Babylon to Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon, saying,

esv.text: The letter was sent by the hand of Elasah the son of Shaphan and Gemariah the son of Hilkiah, whom Zedekiah king of Judah sent to Babylon to Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon. It said:

cnv.text: 這封信是由沙番的兒子以利亞薩和希勒家的兒子基瑪利帶去的；他們是猶大王西底家差往巴比倫，去見巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒的。信上說：

ccb.text: 犹大王西底迦派沙番的儿子以利亚萨和希勒迦的儿子基玛利把这封信送给巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒。以下是信的内容：
